reason: Successfully verified agent QA-20260624-183546-a71j can receive messages and respond with correct mathematical calculation
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded showing sidebar with agent list
Found "QA-20260624-183546-a71j" agent in the sidebar — Agent was visible with "idle" status
Clicked on the agent to open it — Agent detail page loaded, showing agent landing page with message input
Verified agent status — Agent status was "idle" which satisfies the requirement (running or idle)
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the input field — Message was successfully entered in the textbox
Clicked the Send message button — Message was submitted and page navigated to session page
Waited for response — Agent responded within approximately 1 second with the message "2+2 = 4"
Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly shows "2+2 = 4" which includes the number "4"
Took screenshot of the response — Screenshot captured showing the conversation with user message and agent response mentioning "4"
